genre_refs: Vintage WPA / WWII-era patriotic poster, pun on ICE/NICE
description: Vintage-styled, distressed AI-generated poster with a sepia/aged-paper palette, weathered borders, and a halftone illustration look. The headline at top in large bold distressed navy serif/slab letters reads 'NICE AGENTS'. The central illustration depicts an officer in a dark cap, tactical vest, and uniform kneeling on one knee with his hand on the shoulder of a young boy who looks up at him; the officer's vest and a shoulder patch are labeled 'NICE'. To the left is a tattered American flag on a pole; in the background are a watchtower silhouette, a fence or wall, mountains, and a cloudy sky. A bottom banner with two stars reads 'DEFENDING OUR COUNTRY'. The accompanying tweet reads 'ICE -> NICE AGENTS. National Immigration and Customs Enforcement. DO IT!'
